creator: paul@thistledew.org
text:
xsltproc -v -nonet http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl eggdbus-binding-tool.xml 
I/O error : Attempt to load network entity http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl
warning: failed to load external entity "http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl"
cannot parse http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl

Fix: 

xsltproc -v http://docbook.sourceforge.net/release/xsl/current/manpages/docbook.xsl eggdbus-binding-tool.xml
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/eggdbus; [make | portupgrade | portmaster . ]
